headline: Tesla (TSLA) Lands 16 Gigawatt U.S. Power Plant Deal And 25 Gigawatt Hour Europe Pact
summary: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA), Sunrun, and Renew Home agreed to aggregate over 16 gigawatts of flexible residential energy capacity in the U.S. into what they describe as the largest distributed power plant. The U.S. project is intended to serve utilities and power-hungry data centers by coordinating home batteries and other distributed energy resources. Separately, Tesla entered a multi-year partnership with NatPower to deploy more than 25 gigawatt-hours of battery storage capacity across...

headline: Global chip stocks surge as blowout Micron results reignite AI rally
summary: Global chip stocks surged on Thursday after Micron Technology's blockbuster results reignited the AI-driven rally, as investors grew more confident about persistent demand and tightening supply. Micron, a key supplier for Nvidia's AI chipsets ‌alongside South Korean chipmakers, surged more than 17% in U.S. premarket trading after it forecast quarterly profit and revenue well above expectations. The ‌company, whose shares have more than tripled in value so far this year, also said its customers had committed $22 billion to lock in supplies of memory chips, underscoring how AI-driven ​demand is tightening the market.

content.title: Global chip stocks surge as blowout Micron results reignite AI rally

The ‌company, whose shares have more than tripled in value so far this year, also said its customers had committed $22 billion to lock in supplies of memory chips, underscoring how AI-driven ​demand is tightening the market.

headline: Micron overtakes Meta, Tesla in market value amid relentless AI infrastructure demand
summary: Micron Technology edged past the market valuation ‌of Meta Platforms and briefly ‌Tesla's for the first time on Thursday, ​after the memory chipmaker's solid forecast helped extend its AI-driven ascent.  The company's shares were last up 18.4% ‌at $1,236, giving ⁠it a market capitalization of $1.398 trillion, compared with Meta's $1.392 ⁠trillion.  Tesla had a market value stood of $1.4 trillion.

headline: Socure Reinforces Security-First Strategy with Chief Information Security Officer Appointment
summary: INCLINE VILLAGE, Nev., June 25, 2026--Socure, the leading trust infrastructure for global identity and risk intelligence, today announced the appointment of Mark Carter as the company’s Chief Information Security Officer (CISO). The appointment reflects Socure’s continued growth and commitment to operating at the highest levels of security and resilience in the AI era.

summary: Global chip stocks surged on Thursday after Micron Technology's blockbuster results reignited the AI-driven rally, as investors grew more confident about persistent demand and tightening supply.  Micron, a key supplier for Nvidia's AI chipsets alongside South Korean chipmakers, ‌surged more than 17% to a record high after it forecast quarterly profit and revenue well above expectations.  The company, whose shares have more than ‌tripled in value so far this year, also said its customers had committed $22 billion to lock in supplies of memory chips, underscoring how AI-driven demand is tightening the market.
